steps.title: Place the example in the argument
steps.content: The text first says humans are not the only animals that use tools. The underlined sentence supports that point by describing octopuses using seashell halves for protection or hiding.

steps.title: Reject unsupported comparisons
steps.content: Choice A is wrong because the sentence is about octopuses, not human tool use. Choice B invents a comparison about frequency. Choice D invents a claim that octopuses are smarter than birds. The answer is C.
